name: Crocogame
short_description: Crocogame is a fast-paced roguelite game with intense moment-to-moment combat and flexible character customization. Use your resources efficiently to take on increasingly difficult threats. Great challenges also bring great rewards!
detailed_description:
Crocogame is a fast-paced roguelite game with rewarding difficulty progression. The player controls cute crocos, with unique stats and ultimate spells in order to defeat deadly enemies on various challenging maps.

GAME FOCUS

The game is balanced around intense moment-to-moment combat, where movement and attack resources must be used efficiently to achieve victory. A big part of the game's progression revolves around stackable difficulty modifiers, which can turn every map harder in exchange for new, cool rewards.

CHARACTER CUSTOMISATION

During gameplay, the player upgrades impactful stats and collects gameplay-altering essences. As the difficulty modifiers stack up, more essence slots are unlocked, leading to unique build combinations with unexpected synergies and explosive results.

FEATURES

  • Fast runs (~15 minutes each).

  • 10 build-defining stats you can upgrade every time you level up.

  • 6 unique crocos with diverse base stats and ultimate spells.

  • 70+ powerful essences with gameplay-altering effects. You can combine up to 4 of them to create unique builds.

  • 3 playable maps with different challenges.

  • 10 difficulty modifiers for each map to put your skills to the test.

  • Achievement-based progression. Unlock new crocos, essences, maps and difficulty points by completing achievements on different difficulty levels.

  • Challenging normal and elite enemies with diverse movesets.

  • Twin-stick controls for complete immersion in the action.

Can you climb to the top and complete all the maps at the highest difficulty level?
